caption: A medical procedure is performed on a patient's body, with gloved hands using surgical instruments. The setting involves a blue surgical drape and a patient's skin. In the initial frames, one person uses a metallic clamp or forceps to hold tissue while another person's hand, wearing a white glove, works near a thin suture thread. As the sequence progresses, the hands adjust their positions and the instruments move to manipulate the surgical site. A purple silhouette of a female body is visible on the left side of each frame, accompanied by a purple circle containing the text "Day 5". In the bottom right corner of every frame, there is a logo of a building next to the text "Sim Week". The scene transitions from the placement of a suture to the further manipulation of the surgical area using the metallic tools.
